candidates.why: Core SG&A overhead bucket and explicit populated line; preferred over subcomponents/rest lines.

candidates.why: Dedicated R&D expense line above operating profit; best XRD mapping.

Balancing row, not a substantive equity line.

final_choice.row_label: Equity attributable to equity holders of the parent

variables.notes: Preferred parent-attributable equity to avoid double counting with MIB. Included broader equity labels as fallback priority for any year/label changes.
No minority interest / non-controlling interest line appears on the balance sheet preview. Using empty mapping so MIB defaults to 0.
